purpose: Current arXiv metadata source leads for a Causal Research Workbench publication pass. Receipts are metadata only; paper claims require paper-level review or replay before promotion.

query_receipts.query: large language models causal reasoning benchmark

source_boundary.promotion_rule: A source row can shape the workbench, but a source claim becomes MATCH only after primary-text review, dataset/code inspection, or a replayed local check.

relevant_receipts.title: A Critical Review of Causal Reasoning Benchmarks for Large Language Models
relevant_receipts.relevance: Benchmark boundary for LLM causal reasoning; supports the need to separate final answers from graph assumptions and task validity.

relevant_receipts.title: OpportunityFinder: A Framework for Automated Causal Inference
relevant_receipts.relevance: Automated causal-inference workflow lead; motivates a workbench that records intervention target, assumptions, and falsifiers.

relevant_receipts.title: Causal Inference Using Tractable Circuits
relevant_receipts.relevance: Computational causal-inference lead; motivates deterministic graph and query receipts.

relevant_receipts.title: Causal discovery of linear non-Gaussian acyclic models in the presence of latent confounders
relevant_receipts.relevance: Latent-confounder boundary lead; motivates explicit unobserved-variable status in causal packets.

relevant_receipts.title: Causal discovery for time series with latent confounders
relevant_receipts.relevance: Time-series causal-discovery lead; motivates temporal ordering and lag receipts.

relevant_receipts.title: Bootstrap aggregation and confidence measures to improve time series causal discovery
relevant_receipts.relevance: Uncertainty and confidence lead; motivates uncertainty fields and bootstrap receipts.

relevant_receipts.title: Robust Time Series Causal Discovery for Agent-Based Model Validation
relevant_receipts.relevance: Agent-based model validation lead; connects causal discovery to simulator validation.

relevant_receipts.title: A Graph Autoencoder Approach to Causal Structure Learning
relevant_receipts.relevance: Graph-learning lead; motivates separating learned structure from assumed DAG receipts.

relevant_receipts.title: DOME: Recommendations for supervised machine learning validation in biology
relevant_receipts.relevance: Biology validation lead; supports reporting data, optimization, model, and evaluation boundaries in causal-biomedical use.

relevant_receipts.title: Privacy-preserving machine learning for healthcare: open challenges and future perspectives
relevant_receipts.relevance: Healthcare privacy lead; motivates redacted refs and no raw patient payloads in high-stakes causal packets.

out_of_scope_examples.title: Enhancing Human-Like Responses in Large Language Models
out_of_scope_examples.reason: LLM response-style lead only; not used as causal-workbench evidence.

out_of_scope_examples.title: Robust Tabular Foundation Models
out_of_scope_examples.reason: Tabular-model lead only; not promoted as causal evidence without primary review.

workbench_requirements: Every causal claim must declare treatment, outcome, variables, directed edges, observed/unobserved status, and excluded descendants.
Every adjustment claim must carry a replayable graph check and negative controls.
Every learned-structure claim must stay separate from assumed-graph claims.
Every LLM causal-reasoning claim must carry benchmark source, prompt/task boundary, hidden-test hygiene, graph assumptions, and verifier output.
Every biomedical causal claim must carry privacy and data-governance boundaries before publication.
